Yahoo Proxy URL
For 15-second refresh, unlimited symbols on any network, deploy a free Cloudflare Worker (~5 min, one-time). See dash.cloudflare.com → Workers, paste the contents of worker.js, deploy, then paste the *.workers.dev URL here.
Yahoo Cookies (for Options Data)
Required for options flow signals in AI predictions. F12 → Application → Cookies → finance.yahoo.com → paste entire cookie list here (will auto-extract A1, A3, GUC)
API Key
Alternative: a free Twelve Data API key. No proxy to deploy, but capped at 8 credits/min so refresh takes ~10 min per cycle.
Market AI — Prediction Horizon
How long to wait before grading each prediction. Longer horizons favour trend signals (moving averages, relative strength) over intraday signals (pre-market gap, options flow).
Portfolio P&L
Add shares + cost/share to see real $ P&L on held tickers. Stored only on this device (IndexedDB) — never in any export, sync, AI context, or log. Values are hidden by default; reveal briefly with the 👁 button (auto-hides). Panic-hide: Esc or Shift+H.

Dashboard Settings
Stocks Data Source
Recommended. 15-second refresh, works on any network. See ? Help for setup.
Fallback if no proxy. Free tier, ≈10 min refresh cycle.
Market AI
Configure any combination of Groq, Gemini, and Mistral below. All three are free, all three query in parallel, and when two or more answer a final arbiter call consolidates them into a single consensus verdict per ticker.
How long to wait before grading each prediction. Longer horizons smooth out daily noise and favour trend signals (moving averages, relative strength) over intraday signals (pre-market gap, options flow). Predictions are graded as a hit when the price moves ≥ the threshold in the predicted direction.
Keys are stored only in this browser's localStorage and excluded from settings export by default.
Intelligence Signals
API keys are stored only in this browser's localStorage and excluded from settings export.
Calendar
What to do (pick one)

1) You open index.html with a double-click (address bar shows file://) — Do not use “Sign in with Google” (Google blocks that on file://). In Google Calendar on the web, open your calendar → Settings → Integrate calendar → copy Secret address in iCal format (ends in basic.ics) → paste in ICS feed URL below → Save. Done.

2) You want “Sign in with Google” — Open this page from a local address like http://127.0.0.1:8080, not as a file. In a terminal, cd to this project folder, run py -m http.server 8080, then go to http://127.0.0.1:8080/ in the browser, paste your OAuth Client ID, click Sign in, and in Google Cloud add http://127.0.0.1:8080 (and the same for localhost if you use it) to Authorized JavaScript origins.

Sign in with Google (recommended)
Reads your primary calendar via Google Identity Services. Requires an http/https origin (Google rejects file://). If you double-click index.html, instead run python -m http.server 8080 in this folder and open localhost:8080.
Then paste a Web-application OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console → Credentials and add your origin (e.g. http://localhost:8080) to its Authorized JavaScript origins.
Or: public ICS URL
Paste a "secret iCal" URL (Google Calendar, Outlook, or iCloud). Parsed client-side — only the URL is stored. Use Test to verify the link without saving; Save stores it, Reload fetches the saved link, Clear removes the saved link and events.
News Feeds
Each feed appears as its own widget in the news column. Built-in feeds can't be removed but can be hidden via Widget Layout below.
News Topics (AI ranker)
Topics or keywords you care about (comma-separated). When an AI key is configured, every batch of headlines gets a relevance score 0–100; items ≥ 60 show a glowing badge. Example: AI chips, semiconductor earnings, Fed policy.
Weather Location
Detection priority: Manual override → Browser GPS (precise, VPN-proof, needs one-time permission) → OS timezone (city-level) → IP lookup (VPN-sensitive).

Background Image
Opacity fades the image against the theme background. Dim overlay lays a dark tint on top for readability on bright photos.
When a widget is collapsed, show a muted one-line summary built from data it already has (earnings count, weather, top pick, futures). Off by default.
Widget glass
Panel background opacity for every widget (50% = more transparent, 100% = nearly solid). Default 84%: a bit less transparent than the old fixed 72% rgba glass.
Opacity 84%
🔔 Watchlist Alerts
Quiet, rule-based alerts for your watchlist. They appear under the header bell — no pop-ups unless you opt in to browser notifications. Alert history stays on this device and is never synced.
Permission is requested only when you turn this on.
Widget Layout
Show or hide widgets. Drag rows here to reorder — or grab the ⋮⋮ handle in any widget's header on the main page and drag it directly. Drop onto a widget in another column to move it there.
Diagnostics — Test all connections
Check that every connection you've set up is still working — nothing is changed. Only connections you've configured are tested.
About Market AI
Market AI fetches recent headlines and market signals for each ticker, asks one or more AI models to predict its general direction over your configured prediction horizon (default: 5 trading days), and shows a consensus card per ticker. Predictions are graded after the horizon elapses, enabling the system to learn which signals are actually predictive at your chosen timeframe.
How it works
  1. Pulls 2–3 Google News headlines per ticker via rss2json (CORS-enabled, free).
  2. Sends the combined headline list to every configured AI model in parallel (whichever of Groq, Gemini, and Mistral have keys set).
  3. Each model returns JSON: ticker → sentiment + confidence + one-sentence rationale.
  4. If ≥ 2 models answered, a final arbiter model is called once more with every model's output plus the original headlines. It produces the final consensus verdict; otherwise we fall back to majority vote.
  5. Cached for 20 minutes in localStorage so hammering refresh doesn't spam the services.
Models
Groq — free API key for fast open models (openai/gpt-oss-120b, Llama 3.3 70B). Paste in ⚙ Settings → Market AI.
Gemini — free API key (gemini-2.5-flash). Paste in ⚙ Settings → Market AI.
Mistral — free API key on la Plateforme (mistral-small-latest, open-mistral-nemo). Paste in ⚙ Settings → Market AI.
The arbiter prefers Gemini → Mistral → Groq, whichever is available. The tooltip on each prediction icon shows queried: groq · gemini · mistral (struck-through = didn't answer), every model's individual vote for that ticker, and the arbiter that produced the final verdict.
⚠ Not investment advice. This is a toy that summarizes what the news says — treat the predictions as entertainment.
Export Settings
With keys excluded, the recipient's existing proxy/API settings are kept untouched on import. They can set up their own keys later via the Stocks widget (? button).
☷ Your keys QR
On your phone: open StartPage → ⇅ Sync → Scan keys QR, then point the camera at this code.
⚠ This QR contains your API keys (plus flights/hotels) in the clear. Don't photograph or screen-share it; close it when done.
📷 Scan keys QR
Point the camera at the keys QR on your other device (Sync → Show keys QR).

☁ GitHub Sync
Push your full config (stocks, feeds, flights, themes, keywords — but never API keys or tokens) to a private GitHub repo. Pull from any machine to restore everything while keeping that machine's local keys.
GitHub Connection
Project folder: (not set)
Saved folder is reused across launches; the browser may show a one-tap permission prompt per session.
What syncs: stocks, feeds, clocks, quick links, news topics, flight tracker, widget layout, theme, background image, wild mode settings, weather location, Market AI journal.
What stays local: Proxy URL, API keys (Twelve Data / Groq / Gemini / Mistral), Google Calendar client ID, GitHub PAT.
Getting Real-Time Stock Data
The dashboard has three tiers for fetching stock prices. You don't need any of them to see stocks at all — it will fall back to public proxies — but setting one up is free and makes things much more reliable.
① Recommended · Cloudflare Worker Free · Best
15-second refresh, unlimited symbols, works on corporate networks. One-time ~5 minute browser-only setup.
  1. Sign up at dash.cloudflare.com (free, no credit card).
  2. Workers & Pages → Create application → Create Worker → name it → Deploy.
  3. Click Edit code, delete the sample, paste the contents of worker.js from this repo, Deploy.
  4. Copy the *.workers.dev URL.
  5. Click ⚙ on the Stocks widget → paste in Yahoo Proxy URL → Save.
② Fallback · Twelve Data Free tier · 8 req/min
No deployment, just an API key. Refresh cycle ≈10 min for 20 symbols because of the free-tier rate limit.
  1. Register at twelvedata.com/register (60 seconds, no credit card).
  2. Copy the API key from your dashboard.
  3. Click ⚙ on the Stocks widget → paste in API Key → Save.
③ Nothing configured
Works via public CORS proxies. Usually fine on home Wi-Fi, often broken on corporate networks. Cached prices from your last successful fetch are always shown instantly.
🔬 Stock Deep Dive
💱 Currency Converter
Flight Status
Enter an IATA flight code (e.g. UA 123, AA1234, DL56). Fetches from FlightStats (primary) with FlightAware as a live gate supplement — best-effort scrape.
